summary: Investigated the Next.js server error shown on localhost:3000 for /admin/sales-history. The frontend production build completed successfully with no TypeScript or Next compilation errors, indicating the source code was valid. The actual issue was a stale Next dev server/cache chunk on port 3000; a second clean dev server initially started on 3001 because port 3000 was occupied by an old node.exe process. Stopped the stale server and restarted Next cleanly on port 3000, then verified /admin/sales-history and /admin/dashboard both return HTTP 200.
current_status: Frontend dev server is running cleanly at http://localhost:3000. No source-code changes were needed for this error; remaining repository changes are pre-existing/unrelated working tree modifications.
